7 #ifndef ARCANEDEMO_NONCONFORMINGSURFACETEST_NOTMATCHINGSURFACEPROPERTY_H
8 #define ARCANEDEMO_NONCONFORMINGSURFACETEST_NOTMATCHINGSURFACEPROPERTY_H
9 /* Author : havep at Mon Jun 15 16:00:35 2009
10  * Generated by createNew
11  */
12 
13 #include <arcane/utils/String.h>
14 #include <arcane/ItemGroup.h>
15 using namespace Arcane;
16 
17 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/SurfaceUtils/Contact.h"
18 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/SurfaceUtils/ContactVariable.h"
19 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ItemGroupMap.h"
20 
21 class NotMatchingSurfaceProperty
22 {
23 public:
24  enum eProperty
25  {
26  PNone = 0,
27  PSimpleCorefinementArea = (1 << 0),
28  PSimpleCorefinementCenter = (1 << 1),
29  PSimpleCorefinementNormal = (1 << 2),
30  PDoubleCorefinementArea = (1 << 3),
31  PDoubleCorefinementCenter = (1 << 4),
32  PDoubleCorefinementNormal = (1 << 5),
33  PDoubleCorefinementDistance = (1 << 6),
34  PProjectedPoint = (1 << 7),
35  PProjectedDistance = (1 << 8),
36  PCorefinementUserProperty = (1 << 9),
37  PProjectionUserProperty = (1 << 10),
38  PIntegerContactZoningKey = (1 << 11),
39  PIntegerFaceZoningKey = (1 << 12),
40  PEnd = (1 << 13)
41  };
42 
43  static String name(const eProperty p);
44  static bool check(const Integer property);
45 
46  template<enum eProperty property> struct Variable { };
47  template<enum eProperty property> struct Support { };
48  template<enum eProperty property> struct Value { };
49 };
50 
51 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Variable<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PSimpleCorefinementArea> { typedef ContactVariableT<FaceFaceContact,Real> type; };
52 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Variable<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PSimpleCorefinementCenter> { typedef ContactVariableT<FaceFaceContact,Real3> type; };
53 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Variable<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PSimpleCorefinementNormal> { typedef ContactVariableT<FaceFaceContact,Real3> type; };
54 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Variable<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PDoubleCorefinementArea> { typedef ContactVariableT<FaceFaceContact,std::pair<Real,Real> > type; };
55 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Variable<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PDoubleCorefinementCenter> { typedef ContactVariableT<FaceFaceContact,std::pair<Real3,Real3> > type; };
56 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Variable<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PDoubleCorefinementNormal> { typedef ContactVariableT<FaceFaceContact,std::pair<Real3,Real3> > type; };
57 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Variable<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PDoubleCorefinementDistance> { typedef ContactVariableT<FaceFaceContact,Real> type; };
58 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Variable<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PProjectedPoint> { typedef ContactVariableT<NodeFaceContact,Real3> type; };
59 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Variable<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PProjectedDistance> { typedef ContactVariableT<NodeFaceContact,Real> type; };
60 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Variable<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PIntegerContactZoningKey> { typedef ContactVariableT<FaceFaceContact,Integer> type; };
61 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Variable<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PIntegerFaceZoningKey> { typedef ItemGroupMapT<Face,Integer> type; };
62 
63 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Support<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PSimpleCorefinementArea> { typedef FaceFaceContact type; };

65 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Support<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PSimpleCorefinementNormal> { typedef FaceFaceContact type; };

69 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Support<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PDoubleCorefinementDistance> { typedef FaceFaceContact type; };
70 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Support<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PProjectedPoint> { typedef NodeFaceContact type; };

75 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Value<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PSimpleCorefinementNormal> { typedef Real3 type; };
76 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Value<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PDoubleCorefinementArea> { typedef std::pair<Real,Real> type; };
77 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Value<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PDoubleCorefinementCenter> { typedef std::pair<Real3,Real3> type; };
78 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Value<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PDoubleCorefinementNormal> { typedef std::pair<Real3,Real3> type; };
79 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Value<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PDoubleCorefinementDistance> { typedef Real type; };
80 template<> struct NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::Value<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PProjectedPoint> { typedef Real3 type; };
